sections.title: Project Identity Card
sections.content:
## Project Identity Card

**Name:** platform-monorepo

**Primary languages:** TypeScript (61%), Python (24%), Go (15%)

**Purpose:** Internal platform monorepo containing three distinct services and two shared libraries. Managed with Turborepo.

**Repository size:** 1,840 files, ~94,000 lines of code

**Top-level packages:**
- `apps/api-gateway` — Go reverse proxy and rate limiter
- `apps/data-pipeline` — Python ETL orchestration (Prefect)
- `apps/web-dashboard` — React + TypeScript internal tooling UI
- `packages/shared-types` — TypeScript type definitions shared across apps
- `packages/config` — ESLint, TypeScript, and Prettier shared configs

evidence.relevance_note: Turborepo pipeline — defines build dependency order across packages

caveats: Go module graph partially resolved — some vendor deps not traversed

sections.title: Risk / Complexity / Hotspot
sections.content:
## Risk / Complexity / Hotspot

### High-complexity files

| File | Cyclomatic complexity | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| `apps/data-pipeline/src/orchestrator.py` | 47 | Central ETL coordinator — all pipeline logic funnels through here |
| `apps/api-gateway/handler/proxy.go` | 38 | Request routing with 12 conditional branches |

### Circular import risk

`packages/shared-types` imports from `apps/web-dashboard/src/utils` — this creates a circular dependency that will break if either package is published independently. **Recommend extracting the shared utility to `packages/shared-types` directly.**

### Test coverage gaps

`apps/data-pipeline/src/transforms/` has 18 files with 0 test coverage. These are data transformation functions — high risk for silent data corruption bugs.

evidence.excerpt:
# Cyclomatic complexity: 47 (threshold: 10)
# Last modified: 14 authors over 8 months
# Referenced by: 23 other modules
evidence.relevance_note: Highest-complexity file in the repository — primary maintenance risk

caveats: Complexity scores estimated from AST — not profiler data
